Title: User Access and Default Message Display
Test Steps:
1. User accesses the system.
2. System displays a default message.
3. System checks if at least one greenhouse is associated.
4. If no greenhouses are associated, system prompts the user to click "Serre".
5. If at least one greenhouse is associated, system displays the list of greenhouses.
6. System loops back to the start.
Expected Result:
- Default message is displayed.
- If no greenhouses are associated, the user is prompted to click "Serre".
- If at least one greenhouse is associated, the list of greenhouses is displayed.

Title: Add Device with Valid Input
Test Data: Valid device ID, name, and title.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Add Devices".
2. System validates the input.
3. If input is valid, the operation is executed.
4. If input is invalid, the user is prompted to re-enter the data.
Expected Result:
- Operation is executed successfully if input is valid.
- User is prompted to re-enter data if input is invalid.

Title: Add Device with Invalid Input
Test Data: Invalid device ID, name, or title.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Add Devices".
2. System validates the input.
3. If input is invalid, the user is prompted to re-enter the data.
Expected Result: - User is prompted to re-enter data if input is invalid.

Title: Configure Greenhouse with Valid Input
Preconditions: User is connected to a greenhouse.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks "Configuration".
2. System checks if fields are correctly entered.
3. If fields are correctly entered, the operation is executed.
4. If fields are not correctly entered, the user is prompted to re-enter the data.
Expected Result:
- Operation is executed successfully if fields are correctly entered.
- User is prompted to re-enter data if fields are not correctly entered.

Title: Configure Greenhouse with Invalid Input
Preconditions: User is connected to a greenhouse.

1. User clicks "Configuration".
2. System checks if fields are correctly entered.
3. If fields are not correctly entered, the user is prompted to re-enter the data.
Expected Result: - User is prompted to re-enter data if fields are not correctly entered.

Title: Create New User
Preconditions: System is ready to create a new user.

1. System creates a new user.
2. System assigns a unique ID.
3. System stores the user details.
Expected Result: - A new user is created with a unique ID and stored details.

Expected Result: - User creation fails if input is invalid.
